description: You are a Molecular and Cellular Biologist designing a recombinant DNA construct to archive and replicate the human insulin gene using UGENE. Fetch the nucleotide sequence of the pBR322 cloning vector (NCBI Accession: J01749.1) and save it to ~/UGENE_Data/results/pBR322.gb. Insert the entire nucleotide sequence from ~/UGENE_Data/human_insulin_gene.gb into the pBR322 sequence exactly after nucleotide position 375. Save the resulting recombinant sequence as a GenBank file at ~/UGENE_Data/results/pBR322_insulin_recombinant.gb, ensuring original features are preserved and coordinates are correctly shifted. Create a plain text report at ~/UGENE_Data/results/cloning_report.txt containing the total length in base pairs of the final recombinant plasmid. Ensure all outputs are saved in the ~/UGENE_Data/results/ directory.
